name: Karen's Chicken Spinach Linguine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1/2-inch strips.
2. Flour the chicken liberally.
3. In a medium skillet, heat butter over high heat until hot but not brown.
4. Add the floured chicken strips and sauté for 3 minutes on each side, or until light brown and cooked through (no more than 5 minutes total).
5. Remove from heat and pour off excess butter. Add garlic, basil, sun-dried tomatoes, pine nuts, and spinach. Return to low heat and toss until the spinach wilts.
6. Deglaze with wine and chicken stock. Bring to a boil.
7. Stir in whipping cream and 3/4 cup Parmesan cheese.
8. Add cooked linguine and toss until hot. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Divide equally between two bowls. Top with remaining Parmesan cheese.
Makes 2 servings.
